description: Create comprehensive evidence summary figure showing sequence identity, PSPG motif, and experimental evidence distribution
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# Create a comprehensive evidence summary figure

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 7))
fig.suptitle('Evidence Against GO:0080043 (quercetin 3-O-GlcT) for UGT85A2_0 (A0A2H4GSI3)', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=1.02)

# Panel A: Pairwise Identity Comparison
ax1 = axes[0]
comparisons = [
    ('7-DLGT\n(C. roseus)', 57.9, '#2196F3'),
    ('7-DLGT-2\n(C. roseus)', 57.7, '#2196F3'),
    ('UGT85A2\n(A. thaliana)', 37.0, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT85A1\n(A. thaliana)', 36.0, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT78D1\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 26.9, '#F44336'),
    ('UGT78D2\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 26.7, '#F44336'),
]
names = [c[0] for c in comparisons]
identities = [c[1] for c in comparisons]
colors = [c[2] for c in comparisons]

bars = ax1.barh(range(len(names)), identities, color=colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax1.set_yticks(range(len(names)))
ax1.set_yticklabels(names, fontsize=9)
ax1.set_xlabel('Sequence Identity (%)', fontsize=11)
ax1.set_title('A. Global Sequence Identity\n(Needleman-Wunsch)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_xlim(0, 70)

for bar, val in zip(bars, identities):
    ax1.text(val + 1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}%', 
             va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Add legend
blue_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', label='Iridoid GlcTs (closest)')
green_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50', label='UGT85A family')
red_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#F44336', label='Quercetin GlcTs (GO:0080043)')
ax1.legend(handles=[blue_patch, green_patch, red_patch], loc='lower right', fontsize=8)
ax1.invert_yaxis()

# Panel B: PSPG Motif Identity
ax2 = axes[1]
pspg_data = [
    ('7-DLGT\n(C. roseus)', 75.0, '#2196F3'),
    ('UGT85A1\n(A. thaliana)', 70.5, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT85A2\n(A. thaliana)', 65.9, '#4CAF50'),
    ('UGT78D2\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 65.9, '#F44336'),
    ('UGT78D1\n(Q-3-GlcT)', 56.8, '#F44336'),
]
pspg_names = [d[0] for d in pspg_data]
pspg_ids = [d[1] for d in pspg_data]
pspg_colors = [d[2] for d in pspg_data]

bars2 = ax2.barh(range(len(pspg_names)), pspg_ids, color=pspg_colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax2.set_yticks(range(len(pspg_names)))
ax2.set_yticklabels(pspg_names, fontsize=9)
ax2.set_xlabel('PSPG Motif Identity (%)', fontsize=11)
ax2.set_title('B. PSPG Motif Identity\n(44 aa UDP-sugar binding)', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
ax2.set_xlim(0, 90)

for bar, val in zip(bars2, pspg_ids):
    ax2.text(val + 1, bar.get_y() + bar.get_height()/2, f'{val}%', 
             va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax2.invert_yaxis()

# Panel C: Experimental evidence distribution
ax3 = axes[2]
# UGT families with experimental quercetin 3-O-GlcT activity
families_exp = {
    'UGT71': 7,
    'UGT73': 5,
    'UGT76': 4,
    'UGT78': 3,
    'UGT88': 1,
    'UGT89': 1,
    'UGT72': 1,
    'UGT85': 0,  # NONE!
}

fam_names = list(families_exp.keys())
fam_counts = list(families_exp.values())
fam_colors = ['#4CAF50' if c > 0 else '#F44336' for c in fam_counts]

bars3 = ax3.bar(range(len(fam_names)), fam_counts, color=fam_colors, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax3.set_xticks(range(len(fam_names)))
ax3.set_xticklabels(fam_names, fontsize=9, rotation=45, ha='right')
ax3.set_ylabel('# Proteins with IDA evidence', fontsize=11)
ax3.set_title('C. Experimental Evidence\nfor GO:0080043 by UGT Family', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')

# Highlight UGT85 bar
bars3[-1].set_edgecolor('red')
bars3[-1].set_linewidth(2)
ax3.annotate('NO evidence\nin UGT85!', xy=(7, 0.3), fontsize=11, fontweight='bold', 
             color='red', ha='center')

# Add arrow pointing to UGT85 bar
ax3.annotate('', xy=(7, 0.15), xytext=(7, 1.5),
             arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='red', lw=2))

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: evidence_summary.png")
